data.body:
=== SESSION SUMMARY: plan-review gate FINALIZE -> three-pass adoption + remediation epic + prompt-engineering + standing evals ===

Started as "complete the 5 finalize items + run the plan through the gate"; expanded (per Joe) into a three-pass
adoption, a workflow-engine remediation epic, a research-grounded prompt-engineering pass, the agent-vs-single-turn
bright line, the charity/skepticism resolution, and a standing per-criterion eval suite. Epics: plan-review gate
5fd2-a7c2-0aec-48fa; remediation 6f2d-4221-26de-48cc; three-pass framework 9da1-cb98-2e94-4f2b (shared). Session
log = this (251e-8f6e-8682-4b12). All experiment artifacts under docs/experiments/plan-review-gate/ (REFERENCE, not
the deliverable). Commits: 63ba508a (finalize), 3e9c9ab9 (T12 adjudication), e68a8ab8 (tier bright line),
b324932c (reason-first+persona), 447f90a7 (pink-elephant+aggregate Pass-2), 7d1dc042 (charity/skepticism),
4e8fe535 (verifier framing).

WHAT WAS DONE:
1. FINALIZE (5 items): (D) checklist[] on all 31 descriptors; (A) applies_at lifted into the registry + E5 retune;
   (E) parse hardening (gate_lib.robust_findings); (B) tier routing — later corrected (see 4). criteria_v7 -> v8.
2. THREE-PASS ADOPTED (Joe directive, from 9da1/9dba): REPLACES per-criterion model-emitted severity. Pass-1 evidence
   records {finding,criteria[],evidence[],scenarios[],impact} no severity; Pass-2 separate verifier (severity attrs
   + typed binary sub-answers); Pass-3 deterministic veto->confidence->severity->block|advisory (advisory-only v1).
   criteria_v8.json three-pass-native; harnesses/three_pass.py implements all three.
3. NON-DSO GENERALIZATION (E4, rebar+snap): single-turn Pass-1-only OVER-FIRES on held-out tickets (G5 87%, E6 100%,
   E1 80%); agentic verification CORRECTS the false-fails -> the empirical case for three-pass. T10/T11/T12 trigger
   moved to LLM-routed (deterministic 'migration'/'deploy' keyword false-fires on rebar's bash->py strangler).
   Decisiveness-lever A/B: recall 23/24->24/24, COH/T9 correctly kept single-turn.
4. AGENT-vs-SINGLE-TURN BRIGHT LINE: a criterion is AGENT-tier IFF it must probe the live environment (grep/read
   repo, CLI/API, web). Code-grounding is the SOLE job of E4/G1G2/A1 (+G6 mechanism). Reclassified intent-source-
   fidelity, G3, G4, T10, T11 -> single-turn (fed context). Final AGENT tier = E4/G1G2/A1/G6/T8/T1/T3. Root cause:
   conflating 'needs frontier model + large context' with 'needs the tool loop'.
5. INTENT-SOURCE-FIDELITY (candidate new criterion): fires ONLY when a ticket is linked to a session log; FRONTIER
   model (Opus) for the large context; NOT agent (text-vs-text: session log + pre-resolved ticket graph fed in;
   deterministic pre-retrieval if oversized). Addresses the gate's blind spot: it cannot catch silent descoping of
   an externally-expressed requirement (e.g. bidirectional visual editing) never written into goal/ACs.
6. PROMPT ENGINEERING (research-grounded, 2024 + 2026): personas DON'T raise rigor (Zheng 2024; Schulhoff 2024; Hu
   2026; Luz de Araujo 2025) -> NO role/company personas; standard-anchoring instead. Applied: reason-FIRST (leading
   analysis field; Let-Me-Speak-Freely), affirmative pink-elephant-safe FP framing, verbosity-+-findings-count guard
   (zero findings is a valid/best result). Reason-first CORRECTED: it means reason before the structured VERDICT, not
   no-tool-calls (info-gathering precedes analysis). Agent-review levers (2026): plan-before-judge (EvalPlanner),
   evidence-anchored rubrics (Rulers), skeptic + cross-family + unanimity-as-warning (Refute-or-Promote),
   tool-grounded validation; multi-agent debate weak.
7. PASS-2 = single AGGREGATE verifier over all findings on a NON-FRONTIER model (Sonnet) — was per-finding fan-out.
8. CHARITY vs SKEPTICISM: 'read charitably' risked sycophancy. Resolved by AXIS (charity for ambiguous LANGUAGE,
   skepticism for SUBSTANCE) + STAGE (FP-control is the verifier's job): Pass-1 skeptical-of-PLAN + thorough; Pass-2
   skeptical-of-FINDING via charitable plan-reading (charity-toward-plan IS skepticism-of-finding — same critical
   pattern, positive framing, more effective than 'don't rubber-stamp'); Pass-3 deterministic. One pattern: skepticism
   of the claim-under-test per stage.
9. REMEDIATION EPIC 6f2d (scope-capture; brainstorm-first): WS-DOC (docs/workflow-engine.md + intended use + 3-tier
   pattern + prompt-authoring + agent-vs-single-turn bright line), WS-MIGRATE (all LLM functionality onto the engine;
   verify_completion + 5fd2 gate; thin-linear-executor-vs-fanout caveat), WS-PROMPTS (production prompts on the engine
   prompt-library; experiments not promoted), WS-VISUAL (bidirectional visual editing via an ESTABLISHED ecosystem,
   not a bespoke canvas), WS-VALIDATE (capabilities vs Langflow/Burr/Temporal/Prefect/Dagster/n8n/Argo), WS-VISUAL-EVAL
   (first-class visual prompt+eval review), WS-INTENT-ALIGN (find the a88f DESIGN session log, align built-vs-intent).
10. FINAL GATE RUN (three-pass on 5fd2, all overlays): DET floor pass; 3 findings; 1 dropped + 2 advisory + 0 block;
    found a real T12 gap (no gate kill-switch) -> adjudicated resolved-by-design (config-gating IS the kill-switch).
11. STANDING EVAL SUITE: added to 5fd2 (NOT 6f2d) — labeled per-criterion fixtures (recall/false-accept/false-fire) in
    the eval seam, drawn from DSO(read-only)+snap+rebar tickets; eval-gates every prompt change; promotes F10; the
    one-shot E1/E4 SEED it. 6f2d owns the eval SEAM infra only.

READINESS (open items to settle in the brainstorm / before implementation):
A. RE-DECOMPOSE 5fd2's 9 child stories — they predate three-pass, the tier reclassification, the eval suite, and the
   prompt-eng contract. Must be realigned before build.
B. SEQUENCING: build 5fd2 ON the workflow engine vs bespoke-then-migrate — depends on the 6f2d brainstorm (is the gate
   a workflow? fan-out vs thin linear executor).
C. EVAL SUITE is a prerequisite to CALIBRATE Pass-3 thresholds + the confidence/severity math (prototyped, not locked)
   and to make the prompt-eng changes eval-gated rather than research-justified.
D. DET FLOOR (P1-P7) tooling = all-new integrations (LSP/ast-grep/syft/scc/lizard), fail-open; heaviest unbuilt piece.
E. intent-source-fidelity: decide v1 vs follow-on; add to the registry + design.
F. plan-before-judge (EvalPlanner): decide whether to strengthen reason-first into an explicit eval-plan step for v1.
G. FILE the F1-F12 follow-on register as tickets (F10 now promoted into 5fd2).
H. RE-DERIVE end-to-end cost/latency under three-pass (chunking/budget defaults were pre-three-pass).
